mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: Valid config keys have changed in V2
mission.description: [Bug]: Valid config keys have changed in V2. This issue affects 19+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### What happened?

An annoying pydantic warning triggered by: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/blob/f1540ceeab9a8ca1335a49b84be95e27ea7b89de/litellm/types/integrations/prometheus.py#L224

Would be amazing if you could fix this.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: Valid config keys have changed in V2
steps.description:
Remove the `Config` class from the `UserAPIKeyLabelValues` class in `litellm/types/integrations/prometheus.py` because the fields and values are the same and the alias is unnecessary.

---

For more details, open the [Copilot Workspace
```yaml
/pydantic/_internal/_config.py:345: UserWarning: Valid config keys have changed in V2:
* 'fields' has been removed
  warnings.warn(message, UserWarning)
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: Valid config keys have changed in V2 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Remove the `Config` class from the `UserAPIKeyLabelValues` class in `litellm/types/integrations/prometheus.py` because the fields and values are the same and the alias is unnecessary.

---

For more details, open the [Copilot Workspace session](https://copilot-workspace.githubnext.com/BerriAI/litellm/pull/7583?shareId=981f9152-9489-4e87-8883-1b1260c49785).
codeSnippets:
/pydantic/_internal/_config.py:345: UserWarning: Valid config keys have changed in V2:
* 'fields' has been removed
  warnings.warn(message, UserWarning)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
